hero.subtitle: A flawless fusion of modern medicine and five-star artistic space. Where your smile is cared for by leading specialists.
hero.cardDesc: Designed to bring absolute comfort throughout every treatment journey.
hero.imageAlt: Interior of Nha Khoa Nụ Cười Vàng clinic

technology.desc: We continuously invest in the world's most advanced equipment to ensure precise, pain-free treatment and optimal aesthetic results.

items.title: Laser X-Pulse
items.desc: A non-invasive treatment system with lightning-fast recovery.

highlights.title: AI Imaging Diagnostics
highlights.desc: Multi-point analysis that detects oral health issues early with 99% accuracy.

highlights.title: On-Site Digital Lab
highlights.desc: CAD/CAM porcelain crown design right at the clinic, completed within 24 hours.

items.title: General Dentistry
items.desc: Comprehensive family oral health care to international medical standards.

items.title: Smile Aesthetics
items.desc: Restore a flawless smile with ultra-thin porcelain veneers and 3D smile design technology.

items.title: Implant Placement
items.desc: Replace missing teeth with digital implant technology for a lifetime of confident chewing.

pricing.desc: Full cost transparency is our top commitment. Treatment packages are personalized to deliver the highest effectiveness.

testimonials.photo1Alt: Happy client at Nha Khoa Nụ Cười Vàng
testimonials.photo2Alt: Smile after treatment at Nha Khoa Nụ Cười Vàng

items.name: Ms. Thanh Hang
items.quote: The space at Nha Khoa Nụ Cười Vàng is truly luxurious and private. I had 20 porcelain crowns done here and I'm extremely happy with how natural they look and how dedicated the doctors were.

items.name: Mr. Minh Khoi
items.quote: The laser technology here is truly different — completely painless, unlike what I expected. Professional process, saved me a lot of time.

items.name: Ms. Bao Tram
items.quote: The team consulted very thoroughly before the veneers, and the result matched the initial 3D simulation exactly. The smile looks so natural my friends couldn't tell I'd had work done.

items.name: Mr. Duc Anh
items.quote: Getting my implant at Nha Khoa Nụ Cười Vàng was one of my best decisions. The 3D-guided placement was extremely precise, with almost no pain once the anesthesia wore off.

footer.desc: Crafting flawless smiles through the fusion of medical excellence and modern technology. The trusted choice of over 10,000 clients every year.
footer.address: 123 Luxury Street, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
